translated: I wasn't there because I was busy living my own life, but even the song title...
It's called "High Motivation," right?
Um...
Like during the live show, the 2nd and 3rd years were shouting "High Motivation!" to pump themselves up.
They were really psyching themselves up.
Seeing that just made me think, "Wow, they're so cool."
Exactly. It's the kind of song you can't get through unless you have that level of motivation.
But during the actual performance, everyone looked like they were having so much fun and smiling.
It made me realize how much hard work must have gone into getting to that point.
Everyone worked so hard.
Because everyone gave it their all,
it turned out great.
By the way, did you see Nako's impression? Maybe not yet.
Wait, what impression?
You should have her show you sometime. Did you record a video?
Yeah, what is it?
No, I didn't record it, but she's always mimicking the choreography for "High Motivation."
It's so cute, so you should definitely have Nako show you next time.
I want to see it! I want to see it!
She picks the most random parts. Oh, I really want to see.
Oh, really?
I wonder which part it is.
Thank you so much. That's amazing.
Thank you!
All right, we've talked a lot, but we still have more to say, so we'll keep talking next week. Anyway, thank you everyone for all the mail!
All right!
Thank you very much!
